name: Black Bean Relish (Chez Melange)
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Black beans, cooked until tender and drained
1/3 cup Red bell peppers, seeded, and diced the size of the beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir until thoroughly mixed.
3. Allow the relish to sit for 1 hour before serving.
